pageContext.name: I Thought You Were Dead
pageContext.description: Sideshow and ACME Archives are excited to present the very aptly titled I Thought Your Were Dead Fine Art Print!  This Star Wars: The Mandalorian interpretive artwork by Christian Waggoner features a very unlucky Bib Fortuna just moments before he is dethroned by the one and only Boba Fett.  Limited to 195 pieces, this Giclee print is hand-numbered and comes with a certificate of authenticity. A truly beautiful addition to any gallery, this Star Wars art is a must-have for fans of The Mandalorian and The Book of Boba Fett!
